_comment: Voices hosted OFF-site (their files are not in the repo and are fetched from an absolute, CORS-enabled URL instead of Pages). stage_voices.py appends these to voices/manifest.json verbatim, so CI produces the full catalog without needing the (gitignored / oversized) source files. Sizes are fixed and used only for the download progress bar; keep them in sync if a voice is re-exported. REQUIRED on the host: each file must be served with an 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header (e.g. '*') or the browser fetch is blocked by CORS; serving it 'application/octet-stream' with a long immutable Cache-Control is recommended.
